nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Always-follow rule document defining Ruby coding style standards for ECC, covering RuboCop-based linting, Rails conventions, formatting, and error handling guidelines with links to the community style guide.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Always-follow rule document specifying PostToolUse hook patterns for Ruby projects, including RuboCop auto-correct triggers, formatting warnings, and CI gate suggestions for lint enforcement.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Always-follow rule document prescribing idiomatic Ruby and Rails architectural patterns, covering the Rails Way, ActiveRecord persistence, background jobs, frontend integration, and authentication approaches.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Always-follow rule document enumerating Ruby and Rails security requirements, including protection against SQL injection via ActiveRecord, CSRF/XSS/CORS defaults, session hardening, dependency auditing with Bundler Audit, and web safety practices.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Always-follow rule document defining Ruby testing standards, specifying RSpec as the framework, the test pyramid (unit/integration/system), FactoryBot fixtures, test commands, and coverage thresholds.
